app_fire.name: Fire Plan Review Application
app_fire.description: Required for projects in Multi-Family Buildings, Commericial, and Condominiums.

permits.name: A/C Change Out
permits.guidance: A Mechanical Permit is required for the installation, alteration, or major repair of any residential or commercial air conditioning system, but not for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety; this list applies to system changeouts (replacements) only and not to the addition of new units.

items.label: A/C Replacement Data Form
items.description: Unfiform Broward County form for replacing A/C Systems, and detailing Existing and New Unit specs.

items.label: AHRI certificate
items.description: An AHRI Certificate is required to verify that HVAC equipment meets tested efficiency and performance ratings for code compliance.

items.label: Attachments Details
items.description: Provide attachment details for outdoor equipment using one of the following: Florida Product Approval, Miami-Dade NOA, or signed and sealed engineered plans.

permits.name: Additions
permits.guidance: The lateral or vertical extension, or increase in floor area or height of a structure, requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if plumbing work is included
Required for commercial projects only

items.label: Broward County Approvals (Commercial)
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval are required for commercial projects.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems, reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report with foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required when applicable per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including survey, site plan, floor plans, foundation plans, elevations, sections, structural details, window/door schedules, HVAC plans, electrical plans, riser diagrams, plumbing plans, isometrics, and landscape plans.

items.label: Fire Inspections (If applicable)
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Asphalt & Restriping
permits.guidance: The installation or repair of asphalt surfaces requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide a contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Survey or site plan showing the location, type, size, and details of the proposed work.

items.label: Engineering Standard Details
items.description: Provide applicable engineering standard details for the proposed paving and striping work.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are adjacent to the work area, including protection details.

permits.name: Awning/Canopy
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of an awning or canopy requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: Certificate of Flame Resistance
items.description: Provide documentation showing the awning or canopy material meets flame resistance requirements.

items.label: Product Approvals or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approval, or signed and sealed construction plans detailing the scope of work.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide a survey or site plan showing the location of the proposed awning or canopy.

permits.name: Backflow Replacement
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a backflow device requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Device Specifications
items.description: Provide the size and manufacturer of the backflow device being installed.

permits.name: Building Shell
permits.guidance: The construction of a building shell requires a Building Permit. Separate permits are required for interior buildouts or tenant units.

items.description: If applicable
Required for irrigation systems

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit a completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems, reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report for foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Threshold and/or special inspector form required when applicable per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including civil plans, site plans, survey, elevations, foundation plans, floor plans, structural plans and calculations, fire alarm plans, fire sprinkler plans, mechanical plans, electrical site lighting and photometric plans, plumbing plans, irrigation plans, CPTED plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

permits.name: Burglar Alarm (Hard Wired)
permits.guidance: The installation of a hard wired burglar alarm system requires an Electrical Permit.

items.label: Alarm Registration
items.description: If the alarm system is not registered, submit a completed Alarm Registration Application.

permits.name: Carport Enclosure
permits.guidance: The enclosure of a carport or construction of a garage requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval with all elements identified.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide Manual J heat load calculations and energy calculations.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of plans including survey, floor plan, building elevations, structural details, window and door schedule, HVAC plans, and electrical plans.

permits.name: Cell Tower
permits.guidance: The installation, upgrade, or replacement of a cell tower requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for commercial projects

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required for inspections in accordance with Florida Statutes and local amendments.

items.label: Structural Analysis
items.description: Provide structural analysis and calculations for the tower.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a complete set of plans including site plan, elevations, mounting details, electrical plans, and equipment grounding details.

permits.name: Change of Use
permits.guidance: A Change of Use permit is required when Planning and Zoning determines that the use of a building or unit has changed.

items.label: Certificate of Occupancy Change Form
items.description: Submit a completed Building Change of Certificate of Occupancy form.

items.label: Life Safety Plan
items.description: Provide a life safety plan showing construction type, occupancy classification, occupant load, fire ratings, exits, travel distances, emergency lighting, exit signage, fire protection systems, and exit capacities.

items.label: Floor Plan
items.description: Provide a floor plan showing existing and proposed conditions.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Submit signed and sealed construction plans for any proposed alterations.

items.label: Trade Permit Applications
items.description: Submit separate permit applications for mechanical, electrical, and plumbing work if applicable.

permits.name: Chickee Hut
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a chickee hut requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Must be submitted by a member of a Native American Tribe
Must be submitted by a member of a Native American Tribe
Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are affected or adjacent to work area

items.label: Tribal Identification
items.description: Provide identification verifying installer is a member of a Native American Tribe.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the chickee hut.

permits.name: Commercial Building
permits.guidance: The construction of a commercial building requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit a completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Boundary Survey
items.description: Survey showing crown of road elevations, flood zone designation, finished floor elevations, and coastal construction line where applicable.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for all applicable systems, including supporting documentation, installation manuals, and calculations.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report for foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Threshold and/or special inspector form required when applicable per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including civil plans, site plans, elevations, foundation plans, floor plans, structural calculations, life safety plans, fire alarm plans, fire sprinkler plans, mechanical plans, electrical lighting and photometric plans, riser diagrams, plumbing plans, irrigation plans, isometrics, CPTED plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ON SITE FIRE HYDRANT
FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Commercial Pool Heater
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a commercial pool heater requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: Additional plumbing application required for gas heaters

items.label: Survey
items.description: Provide survey showing the location of the pool heater.

items.label: Pool Piping Diagram
items.description: Provide pool piping diagram and system details.

items.label: Anchoring Detail
items.description: Provide anchoring detail including bracket type, screw type, size, length, count, and locations. Must be from manufacturer or signed and sealed by a structural engineer.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans (If applicable)
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing gas piping layout, total developed length, BTU loads, materials, and sizing per FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide installation instructions showing required clearances for maintenance and servicing.

permits.name: Commercial Refrigeration
permits.guidance: The installation of commercial refrigeration systems requires a Mechanical Permit. Fire suppression is required for coolers over 400 sq. ft.

items.label: Broward County Environmental Approval
items.description: Submit Broward County Environmental approval.

items.label: Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed drawings showing location, attachments, equipment layout, and fire suppression systems for coolers over 400 sq. ft.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer installation instructions.

permits.name: Commercial Spray Booth
permits.guidance: The installation of a commercial spray booth requires a Mechanical Permit.

items.label: Broward County Environmental Approval
items.description: Submit Broward County Environmental approval.

items.label: Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed drawings showing location, attachments, ventilation, calculations, equipment layout, and fire suppression systems.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer installation instructions.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Concrete Restoration
permits.guidance: The restoration or repair of concrete on a building requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Submit completed Special Inspector Form.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location of proposed work.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed construction plans detailing the scope of work.

permits.name: Concrete Slab
permits.guidance: The installation of a concrete slab requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the slab.

items.label: Slab Detail
items.description: Provide slab detail showing thickness and reinforcement.

items.label: Residential Lot Coverage Worksheet
items.description: Submit Residential Lot Coverage Worksheet.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are located adjacent to the work area.

permits.name: Construction Temporary Power
permits.guidance: Providing temporary electrical power to a jobsite or trailer requires an Electrical Permit.

items.label: Riser Diagram
items.description: Provide riser diagram signed by an Architect, Engineer, or notarized by the Electrical Contractor.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing the location of the temporary service and construction trailer if applicable.

permits.name: Cooling Tower
permits.guidance: The installation, alteration, or major repair of a cooling tower requires a Mechanical Permit.

items.label: Broward County Environmental Approval
items.description: Submit Broward County Environmental approval.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if welded structural connections are included.

items.label: Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed drawings showing location, attachments, layout, and control systems in compliance with applicable mechanical codes.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer installation instructions.

permits.name: Demolition
permits.guidance: The demolition of a structure requires a permit.

items.description: Required for commercial projects with fire systems

items.label: Asbestos Acknowledgment Form
items.description: Submit Broward County Statement of Responsibilities Regarding Asbestos Form.

items.label: Site Plan or Survey
items.description: Provide a site plan or survey identifying the limits and scope of demolition.

items.label: Utility Disconnect Letters
items.description: Provide TECO Gas clearance letter and FPL power disconnect letter for total demolition.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Provide tree protection barricade plan, including tree survey and appraisal where applicable.

items.label: Temporary Fence and Screening
items.description: Provide temporary fencing and screening per City ordinance requirements.

items.label: Erosion Control Plan
items.description: Required for sites greater than one acre or located along a waterway.

permits.name: Dock
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a dock requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if work encroaches property lines
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Environmental Approvals
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Resource License and Florida DEP or Army Corps of Engineers approval or exemption.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if pile installation is utilized.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location of the proposed dock.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Signed and sealed plans detailing scope of work and erosion control best management practices.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Signed and notarized electrical plans if electrical work is included.

permits.name: Driveway / Patio
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a residential driveway or patio requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing location, setbacks, and dimensions of the driveway or patio.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Engineering Standards (If applicable)
items.description: For asphalt work within City right-of-way, provide engineer detail standards.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are located adjacent to the work area.

permits.name: Ductwork Change Out
permits.guidance: The installation or alteration of mechanical ductwork requires a Mechanical Permit.

items.label: Ductwork Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed duct plans showing duct sizes, R-values, return air balance, and hanging details.

permits.name: Dumpster Enclosure
permits.guidance: The installation of a dumpster enclosure requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed construction plans detailing the scope of work.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the dumpster enclosure.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are located adjacent to the work area.

permits.name: Electrical Panel Change
permits.guidance: The replacement of an electrical panel requires an Electrical Permit.

items.label: Load Calculations (If applicable)
items.description: Required if additional electrical loads are added to the panel.

permits.name: Electrical Service Turn-On
permits.guidance: A Service Turn-On Permit is required when power has been disconnected and an inspection is needed before restoration by the utility provider.

items.label: Electrical Service Turn-On Request Form
items.description: Submit completed Electrical Service Turn-On Request Form.

permits.name: Erosion Control
permits.guidance: The installation of erosion control devices requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for commercial projects (not required for single-family residences)

items.label: Best Management Practices (BMP) Plan
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plan showing location of erosion control devices including tracking pads, silt fences, filter fabric, stockpiles, and other mitigation measures.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing location, height, type of temporary construction fence, and access gates.

permits.name: Fence
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a fence requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for multi-family, condominium, and commercial projects
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Product Approval or Engineered Details
items.description: Required for fence materials other than standard 6-foot chain link or wood.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing location, height, and type of fence and gates.

items.label: Pool Safety Compliance
items.description: If a pool exists within the fenced area, provide details demonstrating compliance with Florida Swimming Pool Safety Act.

items.label: Easement Agreements
items.description: Required if the proposed fence encroaches into an easement.

permits.name: Flooring / Sound Barrier
permits.guidance: A Flooring Permit is required for installation of new flooring in condominium units or similar dwellings located above another unit or service area. Ground floor units, single-family homes, and commercial spaces do not require a permit.

items.label: Condo Association Approval
items.description: Letter from the condominium association approving the proposed work.

items.label: Floor Plan
items.description: Provide a floor plan showing the scope and location of flooring work.

items.label: Acoustic Test Report
items.description: Provide sound transmission/acoustic report demonstrating STC and IIC ratings of 50 or greater and matching actual site conditions.

permits.name: Foundation Only
permits.guidance: The installation of a foundation requires a Building Permit. This permit may be issued as a phased permit prior to full building approval.

items.label: Threshold Inspection & Special Inspector
items.description: Submit Threshold Inspection Application and Special Building Inspector Form signed and sealed by a licensed architect or engineer.

items.label: Broward County & Agency Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and any applicable state or federal approvals (including FAA if cranes are used).

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Provide signed and sealed geotechnical/subsoil report and Special Inspector Form if pile installation is utilized.

items.label: Survey & Flood Data
items.description: Provide topographic survey with flood zone, base flood elevation, finish floor elevation, and V-Zone certification if applicable.

items.label: Full Plan Set
items.description: Provide civil plans, site plans, elevations, foundation plans, structural plans and calculations, mechanical plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

items.label: Maintenance of Traffic Plan
items.description: Provide MOT plan with Broward County, Fire Prevention, and Engineering approvals.

items.label: Phased Permit Acknowledgment
items.description: Foundation-only permits are issued at applicant risk prior to full building approval. Additional corrections may be required to meet code.

permits.name: Gas Piping
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of gas piping requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing total developed length, BTU load for each appliance, piping materials, and sizing in accordance with FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Manufacturer Installation Instructions
items.description: Provide manufacturer specifications showing required clearances for maintenance and servicing.

items.label: Generator Gas Plans (If applicable)
items.description: Provide gas piping plans for generators including BTU loads, system connection, piping layout, materials, and sizing calculations.

items.label: Survey (Generator Installations)
items.description: Provide survey showing location of generator if applicable.

items.label: Broward County Approvals (Commercial Generators)
items.description: Planning and Development Management Division approval and Transportation Concurrency Certificate required for commercial generator installations.

permits.name: Gazebo / Pergola
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a gazebo or pergola requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if electrical work is included
Required for commercial projects (not required for single-family residences)
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the structure.

items.label: Product Approval or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approval, or signed and sealed construction plans.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram if electrical work is included.

items.label: Tree Protection Plan
items.description: Required if trees are located adjacent to the work area.

permits.name: Generator
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a generator requires permits.

items.description: Tree permit required if trees are adjacent to work area
Required for commercial generators

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Required for commercial generators including Planning and Development Management Division approval and Transportation Concurrency Certificate.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing generator location, distances from openings, and compliance with 10-foot exhaust clearance requirements.

items.label: Foundation Details
items.description: Provide foundation design including size, reinforcement, type, and elevation in NAVD where applicable.

items.label: Electrical Plans & Load Calculations
items.description: Provide riser diagram, load calculations per NEC 220, and identify load shedding systems if used.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing BTU loads, piping layout, materials, sizes, and compliance with FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Equipment Labeling
items.description: Electrical service must be labeled to indicate alternate power source connection (generator).

permits.name: Helical Piles
permits.guidance: The installation of helical piles for foundation support requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Submit signed, sealed, and dated Special Building Inspector Form from a licensed architect or engineer.

items.label: Site Plan or Survey
items.description: Provide site plan or survey showing the location of the proposed work.

items.label: Structural Plans
items.description: Provide structural plans detailing the scope of work.

permits.name: Hood System
permits.guidance: The installation of a hood system requires a Mechanical Permit.

items.label: Broward County Approval
items.description: Planning and Development Management Division (P.D.M.D.) approval required.

items.label: Engineered Plans
items.description: Submit signed and sealed drawings showing location, attachments, ventilation, calculations, equipment layout, and fire suppression.

items.label: Manual N Calculations
items.description: Provide Manual N heat load calculations.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide cut sheets for all kitchen equipment.

items.label: Fire Suppression Plans (Type I Hood)
items.description: Required for Type I hoods, including fire suppression drawings and application from licensed fire suppression contractor.

permits.name: Interior Buildout
permits.guidance: The interior buildout of a building shell requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, and Transportation Concurrency Certificate.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Required if applicable.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit floor plans, life safety plans, mechanical, electrical, and plumbing plans, riser diagrams, isometrics, fire sprinkler and fire alarm drawings, and all supporting details.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approvals, manufacturer specifications, installation manuals, calculations, and supporting documentation.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Irrigation System
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of an irrigation system requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Irrigation Plans
items.description: Provide detailed lawn irrigation plans showing piping sizes, layout, sprinkler heads, backflow preventer, rain sensor, and related components in accordance with FBC Plumbing Appendix F.

items.label: Agency Approvals
items.description: Provide approval from South Florida Water Management District and Broward County Health Department (for well systems).

items.label: Water Source & Reuse Compliance
items.description: Identify water source (City, well, or reuse). If reuse is required, all system components must be designated for non-potable use per FBC Plumbing Appendix F.

permits.name: Kitchen / Bath Renovation
permits.guidance: The installation, alteration, or major repair of a kitchen or bathroom requires a permit.

items.description: Required for commercial and multi-family projects

items.label: Condo Association Approval
items.description: Required for condominium projects.

items.label: Architectural Plans
items.description: Provide plan view showing location and scope of work, including framing details and any fire-rated wall assemblies.

items.label: Plumbing Plans
items.description: Show full scope of plumbing work including all fixtures and appliances to be replaced.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Electrical plans must be signed and sealed by a design professional or include contractor qualifier notarization.

items.label: Fire Protection Plan
items.description: Show location of fire devices including smoke detectors, sprinklers, and alarms (not required for single-family homes).

items.label: Flooring Sound Control
items.description: For multi-story buildings, provide sound barrier test reports meeting ASTM E-90 and ASTM E-492 requirements.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide manufacturer spec sheets, installation manuals, and product approvals where applicable.

items.label: Gas Plans
items.description: Provide gas plans including flat and isometric drawings if applicable.

permits.name: Light Poles
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of lights and associated light poles requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Site Plan or Survey
items.description: Provide site plan or survey showing the location of the proposed light poles.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram.

items.label: Structural Calculations
items.description: Provide structural calculations for the light pole installation.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide UL-listed manufacturer specifications for light fixtures.

permits.name: Mobile Home
permits.guidance: The installation of a mobile home requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Property Owner Authorization
items.description: Provide notarized letter from property owner granting permission to install the mobile home.

items.label: Survey, Site Plan & Elevation Certificates
items.description: Provide survey/site plan and elevation certificates showing location, size, setbacks, and elevation of the structure.

items.label: Foundation & Tie-Down Details
items.description: Provide foundation design including tie-down system and minimum elevation requirements in NAVD where applicable.

items.label: Product Approvals & Equipment Attachment
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade NOA for exposed mechanical equipment and tie-down details.

items.label: Construction Documents
items.description: Provide installation instructions, manufacturer specifications, anchoring details, electrical riser diagrams, and finish floor elevation details.

permits.name: New Single Family Residence
permits.guidance: The construction of a new single-family residence or duplex requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit a completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for windows, doors, shutters, garage doors, mullions, and roofing systems, reviewed and approved by the design professional.

items.label: Energy & HVAC Documentation
items.description: Provide energy calculations, Manual J heat load calculations, AHRI certificates, and tie-down attachment details.

items.label: Truss Engineering
items.description: Signed and sealed truss engineering shop drawings reviewed by the design professional.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsurface report with foundation design recommendations.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required when applicable per Florida Statute 553.79 and Broward County amendments.

items.label: Equipment & Fixture Specifications
items.description: Manufacturer cut sheets for all equipment and fixtures being installed.

items.label: Complete Plan Set
items.description: Submit a full set of signed and sealed plans including survey, site plan, floor plans, foundation plans, elevations, sections, structural details, window/door schedules, HVAC plans, electrical plans, riser diagrams, plumbing plans, isometrics, irrigation plans, and landscape plans.

permits.name: New Swimming Pool
permits.guidance: The construction of a new swimming pool requires a permit.

items.description: Structural application required for pool construction

items.label: Pool Safety Act Form
items.description: Submit completed Residential Swimming Pool, Spa and Hot Tub Safety Act form.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsoil report and Special Inspector Form if required.

items.label: Plans and Diagrams
items.description: Provide site plan, electrical plan, pool plan, piping diagram, and construction details.

items.label: Gas System Documentation
items.description: If applicable, provide gas piping plans with isometric drawings, BTU loads, and manufacturer specifications for heaters or heat pumps.

items.label: Electrical Compliance
items.description: Electrical plans must comply with NEC 680 requirements.

permits.name: Plumbing Tunnel Job
permits.guidance: Excavation below a foundation for pipe or drain replacement requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Floor/Site Plan
items.description: Provide plan showing the location of proposed work and clearly label areas to be replaced (e.g., kitchen, bathroom, etc.).

permits.name: Racking System
permits.guidance: The installation of a racking system in a commercial building requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, and Transportation Concurrency Certificate (if applicable).

items.label: Construction Floor Plans
items.description: Provide floor plans including storage layout, structural connection details, fire sprinkler and alarm systems, and electrical plans with calculations if applicable.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ALARM CERT. LETTER REQ

permits.name: Reroof
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a roofing system requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor repairs that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: HVHZ Permit Application
items.description: High Velocity Hurricane Zone Uniform Permit Application with required attachments.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval for roofing materials, underlayments, fasteners, adhesives, and Fire Directory listing pages.

items.label: Asbestos Certificate
items.description: Broward County Asbestos Certificate of Submittal.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Required for multi-family, condominium, and commercial projects. Must show staging areas, fire access, and equipment locations.

items.label: Wind Load Verification
items.description: Provide wind load compliance using prescriptive charts or engineer-sealed calculations depending on project type.

items.label: Roofing Affidavit for Wind Mitigation
items.description: Required for single-family and duplex structures confirming roof-to-wall compliance.

items.label: Rooftop Equipment Affidavit
items.description: Required when rooftop-mounted equipment is present.

items.label: Insulation Attachment Calculations
items.description: Required when installing insulation boards to demonstrate fastening and uplift compliance.

items.label: Withdrawal Resistance Test
items.description: Required when verifying deck or fastener pull-out strength.

items.label: Moisture Survey Report
items.description: Required for roof recover or renovation projects to confirm substrate condition.

items.label: HOA/Condo Authorization Letter
items.description: Required when work is performed on properties governed by an HOA or condominium association.

permits.name: Reuse Connection
permits.guidance: The transfer of irrigation from potable water to the City’s reuse connection requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Reuse Connection Application
items.description: Submit completed Reclaimed Water Connection Application/Permit and Hold Harmless Agreement.

permits.name: Seawall
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement, or major repair of a seawall requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Environmental Resource License
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Resource General License.

items.label: Contract or Schedule of Values
items.description: Provide contract or detailed cost breakdown for the proposed work.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if pile installation is utilized.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location of the proposed seawall.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans detailing the scope of work.

permits.name: Septic to Sewer Conversion
permits.guidance: The conversion from a septic system to a municipal sewer connection requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Environmental Review Approval
items.description: Provide Broward County Environmental Review Approval Certificate.

items.label: Sewer Connection Drawing
items.description: Provide drawing showing sewer connection including 6-inch cleanout up to grade at sewer lateral if not already installed.

permits.name: Shutters
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of shutters requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for minor part replacements that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: Product Approval
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approval with all elements identified.

items.label: Plan Showing Installation
items.description: Provide plan showing location, size, and type of shutters.

items.label: Association Approval
items.description: Required for condominium or HOA projects.

items.label: Wind Load Compliance
items.description: Provide site-specific design wind loads (for buildings over 30 feet) or use Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart for buildings under 30 feet.

items.label: Window & Door Schedule
items.description: Submit Broward County Uniform Retrofit Window & Door Schedule.

items.label: Catwalk Clearance Documentation
items.description: If applicable, provide photo showing door clearance where adjacent catwalks exist.

permits.name: Sign
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a sign requires a Building Permit.

items.label: Sign Code Compliance Application
items.description: Submit completed Sign Code Compliance Permit Application.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing the location and dimensions of the sign.

items.label: Construction Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans including footing details, mounting details, engineering details, calculations, and specifications.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide signed and sealed electrical plans or plans with contractor qualifier notarization.

permits.name: Site Work
permits.guidance: Site work associated with a building project requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for sub-surface enhancement work
Required for irrigation and on-site plumbing
Required for site lighting

items.label: Utility Connection & Capital Recovery
items.description: Submit completed Utility Connection and Capital Recovery Fee Application.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, Transportation Concurrency Certificate, and Surface Water Management approval.

items.label: Civil & Site Plans
items.description: Submit civil plans, site plans, survey, lighting plans, photometric plans, irrigation plans, CPTED plans, landscape plans, and tree disposition plans.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Signed and sealed geotechnical/subsoil report.

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required if pile or vibro-replacement installation is utilized.

items.label: Fire Inspections
inspections: FP FIRE ON SITE FIRE HYDRANT

permits.name: Solar Systems (Photovoltaic)
permits.guidance: The installation of solar (photovoltaic) systems requires applicable Building and Electrical permits.

items.description: Required for mounting panels
Required for photovoltaic systems

items.label: Special Inspector Form
items.description: Required when attachment details involve truss anchors or when otherwise applicable.

items.label: FSEC Approval or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Florida Solar Energy Center (FSEC) system approval report or signed and sealed engineered drawings.

items.label: Roof Plan
items.description: Scaled roof plan showing location of solar panel installation.

items.label: Attachment & Structural Details
items.description: Provide attachment, flashing, and structural design details for wind loads and site conditions.

items.label: Solar Thermal System Documents
items.description: Plumbing riser diagram and manufacturer specifications for panels, pumps, frames, and mounting systems.

items.label: Photovoltaic System Documents
items.description: Electrical diagrams showing array configuration, wiring, overcurrent protection, inverter, disconnects, grounding, and interconnection details.

items.label: Battery Backup (If applicable)
items.description: Provide standby load summary including power ratings and estimated energy consumption.

items.label: Electrical Calculations
items.description: Provide calculations for conductor sizing, conduit fill, and ambient temperature derating.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Specification sheets and installation manuals for all system components.

permits.name: Special Event
permits.guidance: An approved special event requires a permit to be issued.

items.description: Structural application required for temporary structures

items.label: Approved Special Event Form
items.description: Provide a copy of the approved Special Event Form with all required signatures.

items.label: Site Plan
items.description: Provide site plan showing layout including canopies, fencing, and dimensions.

items.label: Flame Retardant Certificates
items.description: Provide flame retardant certification for all canopies.

items.label: Tie-Down Engineering
items.description: Provide signed and sealed plans for anchoring and tie-down details.

items.label: Life Safety Layout
items.description: Provide plans showing seating arrangement, fire extinguishers, exits, and occupancy layout.

items.label: Business Tax Receipt
items.description: Provide a valid business tax receipt.

permits.name: Storage Shed
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a storage shed requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if electrical work is included
Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the storage shed.

items.label: Product Approval or Engineered Plans
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA, Florida Product Approval, or signed and sealed construction plans.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram if electrical work is included.

permits.name: Tankless Water Heater
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a tankless water heater requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.label: Water Heater Replacement Data Form
items.description: Submit completed Broward County Dwelling Unit Water Heater Replacement Data Form.

items.label: Gas Piping Plans
items.description: Provide plan and isometric drawings showing gas piping layout, total developed length, BTU loads, materials, and connection points in compliance with FBC Fuel Gas.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide specification sheets and installation instructions showing third-party certification compliance.

items.label: Electrical Riser Diagram
items.description: Provide riser diagram showing service size, circuitry, conductor sizes, panel schedule, and grounding system.

permits.name: Temporary Construction Fence
permits.guidance: The installation of a temporary construction fence requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location, height, type of fence, and access gates.

permits.name: Temporary Construction / Sales Trailer
permits.guidance: The installation of a temporary construction or sales trailer requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if trailer includes restroom facilities
Required if trees are adjacent to the work area
Required for erosion control (sales trailers)

items.label: Floodplain Permit Application
items.description: Broward County Uniform Permit Application with 'Other' box checked for floodplain review.

items.label: Zoning Board Approval
items.description: Temporary Permit Approval from the Zoning Board of Appeals and Development Order signed by the Zoning Director (for sales trailers).

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Planning & Redevelopment approval, and Transportation Concurrency Certificate.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan with location, size, setbacks, and elevation details of the trailer.

items.label: Construction Documents
items.description: Provide installation instructions, anchoring details, electrical riser diagrams, and finish floor elevation details.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade NOA for anchoring, mechanical equipment, and (for sales trailers) windows, doors, storefronts, and shutters.

items.label: Plumbing Layout
items.description: Provide plan showing water service, backflow, sewer, or holding tank locations if plumbing is included.

permits.name: Tiki Hut
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a tiki hut requires a Building Permit.

items.description: Required if electrical work is included
Required if plumbing work is included
Required for commercial and multi-family projects
Required if trees are affected or adjacent to work area

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide survey or site plan showing the location and dimensions of the tiki hut.

items.label: Electrical Plans
items.description: Provide electrical plan and riser diagram if electrical work is included.

permits.name: Townhomes (Site, Shell, and Units)
permits.guidance: Townhome developments are permitted under a multi-permit structure including a Site Permit, Master Building Permit, and individual Unit Permits.

items.label: Site Permit
items.description: Includes all site-related work such as paving, parking, lighting, irrigation, landscaping, fencing, and CPTED requirements.

items.label: Master Building Permit
items.description: Includes full building plans and documents for the entire structure, including shell and all units.

items.label: Townhome Unit Permits
items.description: Used for final Certificate of Occupancy and unit-specific documentation.

items.label: Site Plans
items.description: Include site plan, survey, lighting plans, irrigation plans, landscaping plans, CPTED plans, and fire alarm monitoring plans.

items.label: Building Plans
items.description: Include architectural, structural, mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire sprinkler, and fire alarm plans.

items.label: Unit Identification Plans
items.description: Provide floor plan identifying each specific unit for unit permits.

items.label: Product Approvals
items.description: Provide Miami-Dade NOA or Florida Product Approvals for roofing, windows, doors, and other structural components.

items.label: Structural Calculations
items.description: Provide full structural calculations, truss drawings, and shop drawings.

items.label: Geotechnical Report
items.description: Provide geotechnical/subsurface report for foundation design.

items.label: Broward County Approvals
items.description: Environmental Review, Transportation Concurrency, and Surface Water Management approvals.

items.label: Administrative Documents
items.description: Include development orders, easement agreements, utility easements, engineering schedule of values, and signature affidavits.

permits.name: Vehicle Charging Station
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a vehicle charging station requires a Building Permit.

items.label: HOA/Condo Approval
items.description: Required if the installation is within a condominium or homeowners association.

items.label: Anchoring Details
items.description: Provide Florida Product Approval, Miami-Dade NOA, or signed and sealed engineered plans for anchoring and tie-down details.

items.label: Electrical Plans & Calculations
items.description: Provide riser diagram, electrical plans, and load calculations for the charging station.

items.label: Manufacturer Specifications
items.description: Provide installation manual and manufacturer specifications for the charging equipment.

items.label: Survey or Site Plan
items.description: Provide a survey or site plan showing the location of the charging station.

permits.name: Water Heater Changeout
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of a water heater, whether commercial or residential, requires a Plumbing Permit.

items.description: Only required when...

items.label: Water Heater Replacement Data Form
items.description: Completed Broward County Dwelling Unit Water Heater Replacement Data Form.

items.label: Manufacturer Cut Sheets
items.description: Provide cut sheets showing the energy efficiency rating of the proposed water heater.

permits.name: Water Service
permits.guidance: The installation or replacement of water service requires a Plumbing Permit.

permits.name: Window & Door Changeouts
permits.guidance: The installation, replacement or major repair of any windows or doors requires a Building Permit. A permit is not required for replacement of components that do not affect approval or safety.

items.label: HOA / Condo Association Approval
items.description: Provide association approval letter if applicable.

items.label: Retrofit Window & Door Schedule
items.description: Provide opening schedule showing size, type, and location of all windows and doors.

links.label: Broward County Uniform Retrofit Window & Door Schedule

items.label: Floor Plan Showing Openings
items.description: Submit a plan or drawing showing the location, size, and type of each window or door. A marked-up floor plan or a clear sketch is acceptable, provided the information is legible.

items.label: Product Approval Documents
items.description: Provide a current Florida Product Approval or Miami-Dade Notice of Acceptance (NOA) for each window or door product being installed. The selected product must be clearly identified within the approval document by circling or highlighting it.

items.label: Wind Load Requirements and Design Pressures
items.description:
Provide documentation showing the required design pressures for each window and door opening.

For buildings with a mean roof height of 30 feet or less, submit a plan showing all openings and their design pressures. This may be based on the Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart or supported by a signed and sealed document from a Florida Professional Engineer or Architect.

For buildings with a mean roof height greater than 30 feet, a site-specific design is required. This must be signed and sealed by a Florida Professional Engineer or Architect and must identify the location of all openings and the required design pressures for each opening. Generic charts or standard tables are not permitted.

links.label: Broward County Fenestration Voluntary Wind Load Chart

items.label: Photos of Doors Adjacent to Catwalks or Egress Walkways
items.description: If a door is located adjacent to a catwalk or required egress walkway, the door must not reduce the required width of the walkway by more than one-half when in any open position. If this condition may be affected, submit a photo of the existing door and walkway for review.
